name: [SNPX] Moonshield
welcomeMessage: Stellanebula Project welcomes all licensed pilots, expedition crews and independent traders aboard [SNPX] Moonshield. Respect the hangar deck, honor the queue and keep your manifests current.
shortGreeting: Welcome to fleet carrier [SNPX] Moonshield. A Stellanebula Project carrier. We are here to support your exploration, trade and transport needs across the galaxy.
